NEW: Detect deepfakes and mobile scams
 
 
 
 
 
 A new layer of protection against today’s scams 
 
 
 
 
 
 
   
 
 
 

  
 
 You already trust Avast to protect your devices. But you can be exposed to modern scams like urgent fake calls and texts, as well as manipulative deepfake content, before any type of malware is involved. 
 
 They rely on urgency, realism, and snap decisions. To help you make informed choices, Avast Premium Security adds an advanced, AI-powered layer of protection. 
 
 Now you can catch deepfakes on your PC1, and risky calls and texts on your phone, in one plan that works alongside the protection you’re already using — not instead of it.
